# nomad_nodes (Data Source)

Retrieve a list of nodes from Nomad.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_nodes" "all" {}

data "nomad_nodes" "ready" {
  filter = "Status == \"ready\""
}

data "nomad_nodes" "with_details" {
  os        = true
  resources = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filter` (String) Specifies the expression used to filter the results.
- `os` (Boolean) If true, include special attributes such as operating system name in the response.
- `prefix` (String) Specifies a string to filter nodes based on an ID prefix. Must have an even number of hexadecimal characters (0-9a-f).
- `resources` (Boolean) If true, include NodeResources and ReservedResources in the response.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `nodes` (List of Object) List of nodes returned. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String)
- `attributes` (Map of String)
- `datacenter` (String)
- `drain` (Boolean)
- `drivers` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--nodes--drivers))
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `node_class` (String)
- `node_pool` (String)
- `node_resources` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--nodes--node_resources))
- `reserved_resources` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--nodes--reserved_resources))
- `scheduling_eligibility` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `status_description` (String)
- `version` (String)
